projectDescription: An open-source, highly customizable monospace and quasi-proportional typeface family designed for coding, terminals, and technical documents.
keyFeatures: 6 monospace subfamilies (sans-serif and slab-serif) with 3 spacing variants each (Default, Term, Fixed)
9 weights (Thin to Heavy), 2 widths (Normal and Extended), 3 slopes (Upright, Italic, Oblique)
Extensive OpenType ligations via calt, dlig, and language-specific features
18+ stylistic sets (ss01–ss20) mimicking popular fonts like Consolas, Menlo, Fira Mono
Hundreds of character variants (cv01–cv99) for per-glyph customization
Custom build system via TOML build plans (private-build-plans.toml)
248 supported languages including Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, IPA
Available as TTF, TTC, Super TTC, and WebFont (WOFF2) packages
Docker-based build support for reproducible font generation
publicApiSurface: buildPlans.<name>.spacing — normal | term | fontconfig-mono | fixed | quasi-proportional
buildPlans.<name>.ligations.inherits — predefined ligation set (default-calt, javascript, haskell, etc.)
buildPlans.<name>.metricOverride — override leading, powerline scaling, etc.
npm run build -- contents::<plan> — build full font package
npm run build -- ttf::<plan> — build TTF only
npm run build -- webfont::<plan> — build web fonts only
